name: Security Watch
description: Fail-closed before_tool_call guardrails for sensitive tools with local audit logs and approval support.

mode.label: Mode
mode.help: monitor=log only, approval=block critical and ask approval for medium risk, strict=block critical and medium risk

policyPath.label: Policy path
policyPath.help: Optional path to a JSON policy file. Defaults to the bundled policy.

logPath.label: Log path
logPath.help: Optional JSONL audit path. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/logs/security-watch-events.jsonl

approvalTimeoutBehavior.label: Approval timeout behavior
approvalTimeoutBehavior.help: Whether approval timeout allows or denies the tool call

blockOnValidatorFailure.label: Block on validator failure
blockOnValidatorFailure.help: When true, unexpected validator failures block the tool call
